subcodes.first_line: O bird of sorrow! The melodious lamentations, cries and mournful songs of the nightingales are acceptable, beloved and pleasing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرغ پر آه و ناله بلبلان را حنین و انین و آه و زاری مقبول و محبوب و مطبوع
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
